_meta.schema: exact: token -> {year, summary, good_for, notes}. Year is approximate (paper / ComfyUI integration).

simple.summary: Naive equally-spaced sigma schedule. The plainest scheduler — used for testing or with samplers that bring their own pacing.
simple.good_for: Useful when a sampler brings its own pacing (dpm_adaptive, dpm_fast) or as a reference baseline; most general-purpose workflows benefit from karras or sgm_uniform instead

normal.summary: Standard scheduler matching the model's training noise schedule. Conservative default.
normal.good_for: Safe starting point that matches the model's training; a fine first pick before trying karras or sgm_uniform

karras.summary: Karras EDM noise schedule (Karras et al, 'Elucidating the Design Space of Diffusion-Based Generative Models'). Most popular general-purpose schedule for SD1.5 and SDXL.
karras.good_for: Default workhorse for dpmpp_2m, dpmpp_2m_sde, euler, heun

exponential.summary: Exponential sigma spacing. Smoother transition between high and low noise than karras.
exponential.good_for: Alternative to karras when results look harsh; especially good with dpmpp_2m_sde

sgm_uniform.summary: SGM-style uniform spacing in noise level. The SDXL native schedule.
sgm_uniform.good_for: SDXL canonical pairing; required by some distilled models (Turbo, LCM)

ddim_uniform.summary: Uniform spacing in DDIM's parameterization. Pairs with the ddim sampler.
ddim_uniform.good_for: Pair with ddim sampler; SDXL refiner workflows

beta.summary: Beta-distribution spaced schedule. Concentrates steps where the model needs them most.
beta.good_for: When karras/exponential look off; experimental alternative

linear_quadratic.summary: Linear-then-quadratic spacing. Used by some video diffusion models (LTX-Video).

kl_optimal.summary: KL-divergence-optimal schedule. Theoretically optimal noise placement under a KL objective.

bong_tangent.summary: RES4LYF custom schedule using a tangent-based pacing curve. Tuned for the RES4LYF RK sampler family.
bong_tangent.good_for: Pair with RES4LYF samplers (res_Ns, rk_*, lawson_*, etc.)

unipc.summary: WanVideoWrapper's default flow-matching scheduler. Couples UniPC integration with Wan's sigma trajectory — picks both the algorithm and the schedule in one widget.
unipc.good_for: Wan2.x I2V/T2V; usually the first scheduler to try on a fresh Wan workflow

unipc/beta.summary: WanVideoWrapper's unipc with beta-distribution sigma spacing. Concentrates steps where the model needs them most.
unipc/beta.good_for: Wan2.x when unipc's stock pacing looks off — beta spacing can help detail in late steps

dpm++.summary: WanVideoWrapper's DPM-Solver++ adaptation for flow matching. Deterministic multistep.
dpm++.good_for: Wan2.x when you want DPM++ character; some users find it cleaner than unipc on still-heavy clips

dpm++/beta.summary: WanVideoWrapper's dpm++ with beta-distribution sigma spacing.

dpm++_sde.summary: WanVideoWrapper's DPM-Solver++ in SDE form — adds noise each step. Stochastic variant of dpm++.
dpm++_sde.good_for: Wan2.x when motion-heavy clips look stale; SDE can add variety

dpm++_sde/beta.summary: WanVideoWrapper's dpm++_sde with beta-distribution sigma spacing.

euler.summary: WanVideoWrapper's Euler adaptation for flow matching. Backed by Diffusers' FlowMatchEulerDiscreteScheduler. The simplest predictable baseline.
euler.good_for: Wan2.x conservative baseline; useful as a reference when comparing other schedulers

euler/beta.summary: WanVideoWrapper's flow-matching Euler with beta-distribution sigma spacing.

longcat_distill_euler.summary: WanVideoWrapper's Euler tuned for LongCat-distilled Wan checkpoints. Applies a fixed 50-step distillation pacing curve regardless of the steps widget.
longcat_distill_euler.good_for: LongCat-distilled Wan checkpoints; likely off-target outside that lineage
longcat_distill_euler.notes: Specialized for LongCat distillation — pacing is fixed by the distillation, not the steps widget

deis.summary: WanVideoWrapper's DEIS (Diffusion Exponential Integrator) for flow matching. Multistep.
deis.good_for: Wan2.x few-step regimes (8-15); some users like DEIS for clean motion

lcm.summary: WanVideoWrapper's Latent Consistency scheduler for flow matching. Designed for LCM-distilled Wan checkpoints.
lcm.good_for: LCM-distilled Wan checkpoints only; off-target on non-distilled weights

lcm/beta.summary: WanVideoWrapper's lcm with beta-distribution sigma spacing.

res_multistep.summary: WanVideoWrapper's RES (Hochbruck-Ostermann exponential RK) multistep scheduler for flow matching.
res_multistep.good_for: Wan2.x alternative to dpm++; some users find RES handles fine detail well

er_sde.summary: WanVideoWrapper's ER-SDE (Exponential-Reverse SDE) scheduler for flow matching.
er_sde.good_for: Wan2.x experimental SDE alternative; worth a try when default schedulers feel stale

flowmatch_causvid.summary: WanVideoWrapper scheduler tuned for CausVid (causal video) distilled checkpoints.
flowmatch_causvid.good_for: CausVid-distilled Wan workflows; behavior outside that context is model-dependent

flowmatch_distill.summary: WanVideoWrapper scheduler for generic flow-matching distilled checkpoints — fewer-step pacing curve.
flowmatch_distill.good_for: Distilled Wan checkpoints aiming for low step counts (4-12)

flowmatch_pusa.summary: WanVideoWrapper scheduler tuned for Pusa-style flow-matching variants.
flowmatch_pusa.good_for: Pusa-style Wan checkpoints; behavior outside that context is model-dependent

multitalk.summary: WanVideoWrapper scheduler tuned for the MultiTalk lip-sync / audio-driven workflows.
multitalk.good_for: MultiTalk audio-driven Wan workflows; off-target otherwise

sa_ode_stable.summary: WanVideoWrapper's stabilized SA-ODE (Stochastic Adams ODE) scheduler for flow matching.
sa_ode_stable.good_for: Wan2.x experimental; SA-Solver family is known for solid few-step performance

rcm.summary: WanVideoWrapper's rCM (reverse Consistency Model) flow-matching scheduler.

vibt_unipc.summary: WanVideoWrapper's ViBT UniPC variant — newer addition with adjusted tangent treatment.
vibt_unipc.good_for: Wan2.x when standard unipc results look stale; less battle-tested than unipc

FlowMatchDiscreteScheduler.summary: HunyuanVideoWrapper's default scheduler. Discrete-time flow-matching Euler — the simplest, most predictable choice.
FlowMatchDiscreteScheduler.good_for: HunyuanVideo default; usually the first to try on a fresh HunyuanVideo workflow

DPMSolverMultistepScheduler.summary: HunyuanVideoWrapper using Diffusers' DPM-Solver++ multistep, deterministic mode.
DPMSolverMultistepScheduler.good_for: HunyuanVideo when you want DPM++ character; some users prefer it over FlowMatchDiscrete on detail-heavy clips

SDE-DPMSolverMultistepScheduler.summary: HunyuanVideoWrapper using Diffusers' DPM-Solver++ multistep in SDE form — adds noise each step.
SDE-DPMSolverMultistepScheduler.good_for: HunyuanVideo when motion-heavy clips look stale; SDE adds variety at some cost in determinism

SASolverScheduler.good_for: HunyuanVideo few-step regimes; SA-Solver family is competitive at 10-20 steps

UniPCMultistepScheduler.summary: HunyuanVideoWrapper using Diffusers' UniPC multistep predictor-corrector.
UniPCMultistepScheduler.good_for: HunyuanVideo at lower step counts (10-20) when you want UniPC convergence behavior

Default for model.summary: HiDream-Sampler passthrough — uses whichever scheduler the loaded model recommends. The least surprising option when you're unsure.
Default for model.good_for: HiDream when you want the checkpoint's recommended pacing without thinking about it

UniPC.summary: HiDream-Sampler's UniPC option (display-name). Standard UniPC predictor-corrector. Maps to the same algorithm as core uni_pc.
UniPC.good_for: HiDream at low step counts (10-15) for predictor-corrector convergence

Euler.summary: HiDream-Sampler's Euler option (display-name). Plain first-order Euler — the simplest baseline.
Euler.good_for: HiDream conservative baseline; predictable and fast

Karras Euler.summary: HiDream-Sampler's Euler with Karras sigma spacing.
Karras Euler.good_for: HiDream when Euler results need better noise pacing — Karras spacing usually helps with detail

Karras Exponential.summary: HiDream-Sampler's Karras exponential schedule. Smoother sigma transitions than Karras Euler's underlying schedule.
Karras Exponential.good_for: HiDream when Karras Euler looks harsh; exponential pacing tends to be gentler
